title: Gussonea deflexicalcarata
taxonomy: Gussonea deflexicalcarata is a species of freshwater snail with gill and an operculum, which is a type of gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Hydrobiidae. This family is further classified within the clade Caenogastropoda, which is a group of snails that have a unique shell shape. Gussonea deflexicalcarata is also classified as part of the phylum Mollusca and the kingdom Animalia. The classification of Gussonea deflexicalcarata is based on its anatomical and morphological characteristics.
benefits: Gussonea deflexicalcarata is a type of freshwater snail, and while there is limited information available about its health benefits, some research suggests that the extracts from freshwater snails may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. However, more studies are needed to confirm the specific health benefits of Gussonea deflexicalcarata. In general, freshwater snails have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues. Further research is necessary to fully understand the health benefits of this specific species.
